title: Severe Drought — Horn of Africa
desc: Rainfall deficit exceeding 60% across Somalia, Ethiopia. Estimated 4.2M affected.

title: Crop Stress Detected — Punjab, India
desc: NDVI anomaly -0.18 in wheat belt. Possible water stress in 320k hectares.

title: Reservoir Low — Lake Kariba, Zambia
desc: Water level at 34% capacity. Down 12% from seasonal average.

title: Planting Season Advisory — West Africa
desc: Optimal planting window opens in 14 days. Soil moisture conditions favorable.
